# Chapter 16: Numerical methods  (~110 pp)
- 16.1 Floating-point arithmetic (15)
- 16.2 Error: truncation, round-off, conditioning (12)
- 16.3 Root-finding: bisection, Newton, secant (12)
- 16.4 Numerical linear algebra revisited (15)
- 16.5 Numerical integration revisited (10)
- 16.6 Numerical ODE/PDE solvers (15)
- 16.7 Reproducibility: deterministic floating-point, exact-arithmetic alternatives (15)
- 16.8 Failure section: famous numerical failures (Vancouver Stock Exchange index drift, Patriot, Ariane 5) (16)

**Archetype**: failure (numerical), uncertainty. **Project**: reproduce a published numerical result from a paper; account for any drift. **Exercises**: 35.
